creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Yasuhiro Kimura from comment #2)

OK, the answer hits upon me. Old symlink is removed by adding following line to new pkg-plist

----------------------------------------------------------------------
@preexec [ -L %D/man/man1/gpg.1.gz ] || rm -f %D/man/man1/gpg.1.gz
----------------------------------------------------------------------

When the package is upgraded with `pkg upgrade` ${PREFIX}/man/man1/gpg.1.gz is removed before instlalling new version.
